# sioyek-dev

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This is a read-only mirror of <https://git.barrettruth.com/barrettruth/sioyek-dev>. Use Forgejo for issues, PRs, and active development.

Arch Linux PKGBUILD for sioyek that "just works".

- Uses development branch
- Bundles the proper version of mupdf
- Supports X11/Wayland

## Installation

```sh
makepkg -si
```
